scripts.all: concurrently -k -n FE,BE,RACER -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "cd racer && venv/bin/uvicorn server:app --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d mysql && npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && (cd racer && python -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt) && sleep 5 && npm --prefix backend run db:setup
